bundle.shortDescription: Unified ham digital-ops nerve center (FT8/FT4 + Tempo)
bundle.longDescription: Nexus is a unified, native ham digital-operations nerve center — FT8/FT4 decode, waterfall, spots, map, propagation, logbook, and awards in one app, plus Tempo two-way free-text calling. It keeps the technical data a ham operator expects — SNR, audio offset, dT, dial freq/band/sideband, mode/tier, T/R + slot timing — as first-class information, and makes station setup and propagation intelligence automatic.
